title: وعي صوتي حرف ال ج
instruction_en: Phonological awareness: the letter Jeem (ج). Identify pictures whose names contain the /j/ sound.
notes: Images are coloring-page clip-art line drawings; NO Arabic word labels are printed on any picture, so all Arabic words are inferred from what the picture depicts (not read), hence low/medium confidence. No sound-position markers shown in any image; 'initial' assigned by best-guess of the standard word. Image inventory: m001.jpg = English alphabet page (M/N/O letters with octopus/mouse/newspaper/mailbox/etc.) — decorative/irrelevant clip-art, NOT a ج item, excluded. m002 = chain (جنزير). m003 = giraffe — Arabic زرافة has NO ج (it has ز); likely NOT a ج item or a mis-embedded image — FLAGGED. m004 = rat/rodent (جرذ). m005 = circus elephant — Arabic فيل has NO ج; likely NOT a ج item — FLAGGED. m006 = mountain (جبل). m007 = carrot (جزر). m008 = camel (جمل). No .wdp/.wmf files present in folder. Overall: Arabic text extraction was garbled and no labels visible, so word assignments are inferred from pictures only.
